info.description: Points service, providing points earning, spending, rule management, statistics and other functions
info.title: Point Service API

get.description: Admin operation. Query the list of points rules under the tenant. By default, only enabled rules are returned. Set include_disabled=true to also return disabled rules.

post.description: Admin operation. Create a new points rule for the tenant. The rule automatically triggers points issuance when matching an event type.
Admin operation. Dry-run to calculate the rule parameters and expected points for a given event type. Does not actually issue points or modify any data.

get.description: Admin operation. Get rule details by rule ID.

put.description: Admin operation. Partially update points rule fields. Only updates fields provided in the request (name, event_type, points, multiplier, daily_limit, total_limit, enabled).

delete.description: Admin operation. Soft-delete a points rule (set enabled=false). Does not physically delete the record. Calling again on a disabled rule returns 404.

404.description: Rule not found or already disabled

get.description: Admin operation. Verify the hash-chain integrity of a points account block by block. Detects tampering events.
get.summary: Verify points account event chain integrity

get.description: Paginated query of all points accounts under the tenant, filterable by status.

post.description: Create a points account for the user under the current tenant. A user can only have one points account under the same tenant.

Admin operation. Match enabled points rules under the tenant by event type and automatically issue points. Calculation logic: base points × multiplier. If daily_limit is configured, check the amount already earned today.
Admin operation. Issue points to multiple users in a single request. Each record is processed independently; failure of one does not affect others.

200.description: Batch issuance completed, returns success and failure counts

get.description: Admin operation. Query the current tenant's points configuration, including points type, exchange rate, expiration policy, feature toggles, etc.

put.description: Admin operation. Update the current tenant's points configuration parameters (points type, exchange rate, expiration policy, feature toggles, etc.). Only updates fields provided in the request.

delete.description: Admin operation. Delete the current tenant's points configuration.

get.description: Admin operation. Get aggregated statistics for the current tenant: total accounts, active accounts, total balance, total earned/spent/expired, monthly data, total transactions.
Admin operation. Paginated query of all users' points transaction records under the tenant, filterable by type and user, sorted by creation time in descending order.

delete.description: Admin operation. Delete a user's points account (physical deletion).

post.description: Admin operation. Adjust user points. Positive values increase points, negative values decrease points. It is recommended to provide a clear reason for audit traceability.

200.description: Points adjustment successful, returns account and transaction records

post.description: Admin operation. Manually trigger points expiration, deducting the specified points from available balance and marking them as expired. If the requested amount exceeds the current available balance, it is settled proportionally. Idempotent via X-Idempotency-Key header.
Admin operation. Freeze user's available points, transferring the specified amount from available balance to frozen balance. Frozen points cannot be spent.

200.description: Points frozen successfully, returns account and transaction records

400.description: Bad request or insufficient available balance

put.description: Admin operation. Update points account status. Suspended status prevents earn/spend operations; closed status is irreversible.

post.description: Admin operation. Unfreeze previously frozen points, restoring them to available balance. The unfreeze amount cannot exceed the current frozen balance.

200.description: Points unfrozen successfully, returns account and transaction records

400.description: Bad request or insufficient frozen balance

get.description: Internal service call for other microservices to query points account information.

post.description: Internal service call to anonymize all points data of a specified user for GDPR erasure compliance.
Internal service call to export a user's points account and statistics data for GDPR data export compliance.

get.description: Get runtime status information of the points service.
Get points account information by user ID, including available balance, frozen balance, total earned, total spent, expired points, points type, exchange rate, etc.

post.description: Confirm deduction of points from frozen balance. Suitable for scenarios where frozen points are actually deducted after order confirmation. Workflow: Freeze → ConfirmDeduction or Unfreeze.

200.description: Deduction confirmed successfully, returns account and transaction records

400.description: Bad request or insufficient frozen balance

post.description: Add points to a user account. If the account does not exist, it is automatically created. Idempotent via X-Idempotency-Key header.

200.description: Points issued successfully, returns account and transaction records

post.description: Redeem points for a specified type of item (e.g., coupon, discount). Requires the tenant to have ExchangeEnabled configuration enabled. Points are deducted upon redemption and are irreversible.

200.description: Points redeemed successfully, returns account and transaction records

get.description: Query the details of points that will expire within the next N days in the user's account, including source, amount, expiration date, and remaining days for each entry.

post.description: Refund spent points to the user for scenarios such as order refunds or transaction reversals. It is recommended to include related_tx_id to establish the refund chain.

200.description: Points refunded successfully, returns account and transaction records

get.description: Perform anti-fraud/arbitrage risk assessment on a points account based on multi-dimensional factors (freeze count, spending ratio, recent earning frequency, negative balance, transaction activity).

200.description: Risk score (score>=70 high risk, 40-69 medium risk, <40 low risk)

post.description: Deduct available points from a user account. The account must exist and have sufficient balance; frozen points cannot be spent.

200.description: Points spent successfully, returns account and transaction records

get.description: Get comprehensive statistics for a user's points account: current balance, total earned/spent/expired, monthly data, points expiring within 30 days.
Paginated query of a user's points transaction history, filterable by type, sorted by creation time in descending order.
Query transaction details by transaction ID, including balance snapshots (balance_before / balance_after).

post.description: Transfer points from the current user's account to another user under the same tenant. Requires the tenant to have TransferEnabled configuration enabled. Idempotent via X-Idempotency-Key header to prevent duplicate transfers.

200.description: Points transferred successfully, returns account and transaction records

get.description: Calculate the cash value of the current balance based on points type and exchange rate. cash_value = balance / exchange_rate. Only cash_equivalent type can be redeemed.

amount.description: Positive to increase, negative to decrease

has_next.description: HasNext indicates whether there is a next page

has_prev.description: HasPrev indicates whether there is a previous page

page.description: Page is the current page number (1-based)

page_size.description: PageSize is the number of items per page

total.description: Total is the total number of items across all pages

total_pages.description: TotalPages is the total number of pages

bearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
bearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.description: Points account management: create, query, freeze
tags.name: Points Account

tags.description: Points Operations: Get, Spend, Transfer, Expire
tags.name: Points Operations

tags.description: Points Rule Management: Create, Edit, Activate
tags.name: Points Rules

tags.description: Points Management Backend: Global Configuration, Audit
tags.name: Points Management
